subcodes.first_line: O true lover! Be thou a dawning star, a brilliant lamp, a shining orb, and a towering palm tree, through bounty and grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محب صادق نجم بازغ باش و سراج باهر و کوکب شارق و نخل باسق از فضل و موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
